blockers.description: DRAFTS folder system not formalized. Multiple pending items lack tracking status. No visibility into pending-review vs. approved vs. rejected. No aging alerts.

Add to daily Blocker Board refresh (6 AM) to flag items >7 days pending. Audit /DRAFTS/ folder today, populate initial DRAFTS_STATUS.json with all files.

blockers.description: VERCEL_TOKEN not stored in environment. Atlas cannot trigger manual deploys or verify Vercel env vars without browser OAuth.
blockers.action: Go to vercel.com/account/tokens → Create Personal Access Token (name: atlas-deploy). Add to ~/.openclaw/.env as VERCEL_TOKEN=<token>. Test: echo $VERCEL_TOKEN should output token. Needed for: programmatic deploys, env var audits, Vercel API access.

blockers.description: OAuth redirect_uri_mismatch blocking local dev auth. 127.0.0.1 callback not registered in Google Cloud Console for dev environment.
blockers.action: Go to console.cloud.google.com → APIs & Services → Credentials → OAuth 2.0 Client IDs. Add http://127.0.0.1:3000 (adjust port if needed) to Authorized redirect URIs. Save. Test callback. Blocks: local dev Gmail/Calendar auth, local Workspace API testing.
